name: changedetection.io
compose:
name: slashnode-changedetection-io
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/dgtlmoon/changedetection.io:0.55.7
    container_name: changedetection-io
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:5037
      USE_X_SETTINGS: '1'
      HIDE_REFERER: 'true'
      TZ: Etc/UTC
      DISABLE_VERSION_CHECK: 'true'
    volumes:
      - app_data:/datastore
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5037:5000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-changedetection-io_app_data
